_OpaqueOutput.description: Generic envelope wrapper for bridge-registered tools' outputs.
_OpaqueOutput.title: _OpaqueOutput

description: LLM-facing verify params — citizen-shape `{scope_list, purpose_ko, purpose_en}`.

purpose_en.description: English-language one-line purpose statement (for audit logs).
purpose_en.title: Purpose En

purpose_ko.description: Korean-language one-line purpose statement shown to the citizen during the consent prompt. Example: '종합소득세 신고'.
purpose_ko.title: Purpose Ko

scope_list.description: List of '<verb>:<adapter_family>.<action>' scope strings the downstream lookup/submit calls will need. The verify ceremony issues a DelegationToken bound to exactly this scope set.
scope_list.title: Scope List

title: mock_verify_gongdong_injeungseo
